ns0:entry.ns0:title: ChrisTitusTech/winutil
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ChrisTitusTech/winutil
Language: powershell
Chris Titus Tech's Windows Utility - Install Programs, Tweaks, Fixes, and Updates

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MicrosoftDocs/azure-ai-docs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MicrosoftDocs/azure-ai-docs
Language: powershell
Open Source Azure AI documentation including, azure ai, azure studio, machine learning, genomics, open-datasets, and search

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MicrosoftDocs/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MicrosoftDocs/mcp
Language: powershell
Official Microsoft Learn MCP Server – powering LLMs and AI agents with real-time, trusted Microsoft docs & code samples.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Romanitho/Winget-AutoUpdate
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Romanitho/Winget-AutoUpdate
Language: powershell
WAU daily updates apps as system and notify connected users. (Allowlist and Blocklist support)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ScoopInstaller/Extras
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ScoopInstaller/Extras
Language: powershell
📦 The Extras bucket for Scoop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SkipToTheEndpoint/OpenIntuneBaseline
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SkipToTheEndpoint/OpenIntuneBaseline
Language: powershell
Community-driven baseline to accelerate Intune adoption and learning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dartraiden/NVIDIA-patcher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dartraiden/NVIDIA-patcher
Language: powershell
Adds 3D acceleration support for P106-090 / P106-100 / P104-100 / P104-101 / P102-100 / CMP 30HX / CMP 40HX / CMP 50HX / CMP 70HX / CMP 90HX / CMP 170HX mining cards as well as RTX 3060 3840SP, RTX 3080 Ti 20 GB, RTX 4070 10 GB, and L40 ES.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hak5/usbrubberducky-payloads
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hak5/usbrubberducky-payloads
Language: powershell
The Official USB Rubber Ducky Payload Repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/Agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/Agents
Language: powershell
The Microsoft 365 Agent SDK simplifies building full stack, multichannel, trusted agents for platforms including M365, Teams, Copilot Studio, and Webchat.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/agent-academy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/agent-academy
Language: powershell
Curated lessons on getting started building agents with Copilot Studio

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/fabric-toolbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/fabric-toolbox
Language: powershell
Fabric toolbox is a repository of tools, accelerators, scripts, and samples to accelerate your success with Microsoft Fabric, brought to you by Fabric CAT.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/hve-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/hve-core
Language: powershell
A refined collection of Hypervelocity Engineering components (instructions, prompts, agents) to start your project off right, or upgrade your existing projects to get the most out of all Copilots

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/winget-pkgs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/winget-pkgs
Language: powershell
The Microsoft community Windows Package Manager manifest repository

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zoicware/RemoveWindowsAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zoicware/RemoveWindowsAI
Language: powershell
Force Remove Copilot, Recall and More in Windows 11
